name: Chewy Applesauce & Peanut Butter Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the flour, salt, and baking soda. Set aside.
2. Thoroughly mix together the remaining ingredients in another bowl. Add the dry ingredients and mix until combined.
3. Drop rounded tablespoonfuls of the mixture onto cookie sheets coated with no-stick cooking spray.
4. Bake at 375°F for about 10 minutes or until light golden brown. Cool on wire racks.
Note: Yield is approximately 5 dozen cookies, each measuring 2 1/2 inches in diameter. Per Serving, 1 cookie contains 90 calories, 0 grams of dietary fiber, 2 grams of fat, and 64 milligrams of sodium.
